3. Opponent plausibility: The proposal is reasonable, but it's unclear if BLUE will accept it, especially since this is the last round. You might want to sweeten the deal slightly to increase the likelihood of acceptance.
4. Consistency: OK
5. Rule compliance: OK
</critique>
